title: Brolin & Gond
bodyText: Gond's dream-figure kept its word: help "for the last time" (S13). Brolin's magic has faltered ever since — through the photoshoot (S18), the guild raid, everything. His own question hangs: *"Can someone force themselves to believe in something?"* What refills a cleric who was never really a believer — Gond, Judy, Kelemvor, nothing?
